---
title: "Charles Layton"
---

## Charles Layton

**Dates:** (fl. 5 July 1860)

### Description

publisher

### Biography

Charles Layton, agent of Daniel Appleton and Co. of New York. See <i>The George Eliot Letters</i>, ed. Gordon S. Haight (New Haven, 1954-56), III, 268, n. 4.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 12th 1867
- Letter from Nov. 26 1866
- Letter from May 9th [1865]
- Letter from July 5th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
